caption: A man wearing a black baseball cap with a winged logo and a black t-shirt with "CHECK IT MAN" printed on the front is seated in a studio setting. He wears headphones and has a gold chain around his neck and gold jewelry on his wrists. In front of him is a professional microphone. The background consists of a white wall with gold stars and the phrase "BRICKEST HUSTLE" repeated vertically. To his right, a red and black sign says "BOSS TALK 101," and a smaller logo on the left reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST." Across the sequence, the man adjusts his headphones, moving his hands from the sides of the earcups toward the top of his head and back down. His facial expression remains focused as he looks slightly off-camera, and the camera angle remains steady throughout the action.
